# Generic B2B SaaS Go-to-Market Plan

## Commercial thesis

The launch targets operations and revenue operations leaders at regulated mid-market SaaS companies. The buying trigger is annual planning; the commercial outcome is qualified demo requests.

## Activation inputs

Offer: B2B workflow automation platform
Market: Mid-market SaaS operations teams
Locale: US
Geographies: United States, Canada
Industries: Software, Professional services
Company sizes: 200-1000, 1000+
Company names: Northstar Software, Apex Systems
Account lists: Tier 1 SaaS accounts
Job titles: VP Operations, Director of Revenue Operations
Job functions: Operations, Sales
Seniorities: Director, VP
Skills: Revenue operations, Workflow automation
Keywords: workflow automation software, revenue operations platform
Pains: manual handoffs
Gains: faster operational visibility
Objections: migration effort
Triggers: annual planning cycle
Exclusions: Current customers
Negative keywords: jobs, training
Suppression lists: active opportunities
Campaign goal: qualified demo requests
Budget: $20,000
Conversion event: Qualified demo request
Measurement thresholds: 30 qualified demo requests
Audience sizing requirements: 10,000 reachable members
Preferred channels: linkedin-ads, google-ads-youtube, microsoft-ads
